--- Round 1 ---
<think>I need to classify this judgment document (DOC6) into one of 5 case types: 行政案件 (administrative), 民事案件 (civil), 执行案件 (execution), 赔偿案件 (compensation), or 刑事案件 (criminal).

To do this, I need to read the document content to understand what type of case it is. Let me start by opening the first section to get an overview of the document.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"1","expected_evidence":"Information about the case type, parties involved, and nature of the dispute"}</search>
<info anchor_id="1">
唐冬梅：
你因原审被告人王昊非法吸收公众存款一案，不服丹东市振安区人民法院（2022）辽0604刑初71号刑事判决，以“我向法院提供的银行流水足以证明，我支付给被告人王昊的现金和银行转账多达400余万元，而王昊转给我的款项仅仅200余万元，我给王昊的款项有借条及转帐记录为证，王昊对其打给我的借条不认可，原判在不向我询问核实的情况下就加以认定，有悖于民法，我与王昊的经济往来应经相互抵顶后确认是多还是少，不能拿着受害人的财产拍卖再返还受害人；原判没有定性案涉财产是赃款、赃物，且没有定性是否追缴，应认定为案涉财产系民事法律关系中的财产，撤销原判中对我车辆及房产的拍卖及查封等”为主要理由，向本院提出申诉。

</info>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>From the first section, I can see this is a criminal case (刑事案件). The key evidence is:
- "你因原审被告人王昊非法吸收公众存款一案" - This indicates the original case was about "非法吸收公众存款" (illegally absorbing public deposits), which is a criminal offense
- "（2022）辽0604刑初71号刑事判决" - The case number contains "刑初" which indicates it's a criminal first-instance judgment
- "刑事判决" - explicitly states it's a criminal judgment

This document (DOC6) is clearly a 刑事案件 (criminal case). The document title is 《判决文书6》.

I have enough information to classify this document. Let me stop and provide the answer.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"Document clearly identified as a criminal case based on case number containing '刑初' and explicit mention of '刑事判决' and '非法吸收公众存款' criminal offense"}</search>
<answer>["《判决文书6》"]</answer>
